themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "Augustine of Hippo on Exposition on Psalm 64: Say we, therefore, ourselves also: "Hearken, O...". Word-study detail reinforces "וַיִּֽירְא֗וּ: shall fear - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten".
